name: retrieval-safe-v3
description: Conservative settings for retrieval-heavy workloads (NIAH/QA) on Qwen2.5-7B with paired gate validation through 32K.

latest_observed.notes: Paired NIAH gate met at 4K/8K/16K/32K (6 seeds per depth) with key=8/value=6/buffer=16384. At 32K, buffer=12288 gave 8.33pp delta, while 16384 reduced delta to 1.39pp (1 miss in 72 eligible cases).
